# Cosmic Cartographers of Faith
## Scripture
"The Son is the radiance of God’s glory and the exact representation of his being, sustaining all things by his powerful word." - Hebrews 1:3

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we are reminded of the vast expanse of God's creation. The stars, planets, and galaxies are all interconnected, forming a intricate map of the universe. In a similar way, our lives are part of a larger narrative, with each experience and relationship contributing to the grand tapestry of God's plan. Just as cartographers map the earth to understand its terrain and features, we can be cosmic cartographers of faith, mapping our journey with God and navigating the twists and turns of life. Jesus, the radiance of God's glory, illuminates our path and sustains us with his powerful word.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, thank you for the beauty and complexity of your creation. Help us to see our lives as part of a larger story, with each moment and experience contributing to your grand plan. May we be cosmic cartographers of faith, navigating life's journey with the light of Jesus guiding us. Sustain us with your powerful word and fill us with wonder and awe at the majesty of your creation. Amen.
